The restaurant in Bangkok Silver Hotel has an unusual menu. It serves a buffet breakfast and a breakfast with a choice of menu. It offers a buffet lunch and two sets menus of four courses. For supper, there're a buffet supper and a choice of menu (a menu of four courses). I chose a chicken dish from the menu while my brother ordered a fish dish from it. The cafe in the hotel also has an excellent menu. I made a table reservation for two people for five after two this Tuesday at the cafe.

The swim shorts or swim trunks or swimming trunks in Hollister come in six sizes: extra small, smalk, medium, large, extra large and extra extra large. Its chinos come in many sizes. These khaki chinos are the wrong size. They aren't my size, nor are they my cousin's size. This pair of khaki chinos is a size thirty six. Do you have them in a size thirty one? I take a size thirty one in chinos whereas my cousin is a size thirty three in them. However, I'd luke to try a size thirty one pair and a size thirty three pair on for size. If both pairs aren't my size, can they be cut to size? If not, I'll need to get them cut to size somewhere else. What is your size high heels 👠? What size swimsuit 🩱or bathing suit does your cousin take? What size skirt is your sister? I wanna try this suit jacket in a larger size. Do you have it in a bigger size because I think it's two sizes too small? I need a bigger size. My brother has tried it on and it's the right size. I also wanna try this sky blue swim trunks🩲. My brother has tried them and they're the wrong size. Do you have them in large size because I think it's one size too small? This branch doesn't have the pink blouse👚 and the red high heels 👠in Celine's size so she'll have to visit another branch. Celine generally wears a size six in dresses 👗🥻and size eight and a half in shoes, including flats🥿, high heels👠 and sneakers 👟. She is generally a small size in t-shirts 👕 whereas I generally take medium size. A notice in the shop says "If you spend over five hundred and eighty dollars 💵in a single transaction, you get a pocket size mirror as a free gift." I'm gonna make Celine a gift 🎁 of a beige blouse 👚, a pair of sky blue mom jeans 👖, a navy blue bikini 👙, a pink tankini and a pair of red high heels 👠along with the pocket-sized mirror.
